{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230053364073ABBFE443BF1CDE5C"}"},"total":428},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7346005683049382680","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体还不错，至于为啥只有七点多的评分，估计是大家看多了类似的书籍以至于索然无味，但对于书虫来说，还是不错的，比较耐看，至于有人说加工厂要辞职人员为啥要留下来，这个问题，它本身就没有问题，首先主角得摆摊，属于甩手掌柜，得要一个信奈的管事，管事有信奈的伙计，那流程就能走起来，至于说叛变，可能性不大，工资福利待遇，上班时间都是固定的，还有一些而外惊喜，就现实社会有这样的公司，我想大家都不会想着偷秘方跑路，一个是固定饭碗，一个是戴着口罩过生活的，是个人都知道怎么选，后者搞不好还得进局子里混粥喝"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1710380320,"group_id":"7320243029913127998","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个啥也不是的男人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4gB39geCZMcAdphvrHtaWOAj+17HCX1wN1xbv0RzdTJ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"4345689272493776","user_name":"爱吃香菇米饼的白慕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4345689272493776","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7320243029913127998","book_info":{"abstract":"苏阳孤身带三岁大的妹妹，意外绑定神级小吃摊系统。
于是他开始在深夜大桥上卖包子，清晨的公园卖烤鸡，肛肠医院门口卖大肠，马拉松赛场卖烧烤……
苏阳做出的美食让食客流连忘返，彻底沦陷。
但为了完成任务，苏阳每次只能前往随机地点摆摊。
于是食客们坐不住了……
城管队长：“我求你别跑了，我真不抓你，我是要买东西吃啊！”
某大学生：“哥，你快点出摊吧，我现在翻来覆去睡不着，哥，我求你了……”
妹妹同学家长：“孩子…你一定要跟依依搞好关系，努力套出她哥哥出摊位置！”
江北市富商：“谁知道他在哪出摊，我愿意出十万！”
国宴总管：“去，把苏先生请来。”
随着苏阳神摊名气越来越大，竟是彻底出圈，轰动了国外……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/201fcae99584340e2c5176d3c2999122","author":"大鲸鱼吹泡泡","author_id":"","book_id":"7320243029913127998","book_name":"随机小吃摊，我的食客遍布全球","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7320507893801812542","read_count":"10761","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2679037"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"1303","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,直播,美食","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2b0c784f8e1c78191a603b7bf32e8e14~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382416&x-signature=eF9AxwUvn4JAP%2BULuOYeMCrJByY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"941599675396231","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"122"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230053364073ABBFE443BF1CDE5C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":36163,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":9342},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author
